name: DS20 Mirage
note: BO7-native Meta-AR (5.56 NATO, 606 RPM, 30-round). Erste Voll-Extraktion (Quelle wz_attachment_deltas.md). Hier kanonisiert auf weapon-spez (MUZZLE/BARREL/MAGAZINE/FIRE MODS); universelle Slots = BO7-Pool. Volle Universal-Dumps in wz_attachment_deltas.md.

BARREL: 18.9" Westerlies Barrel :: +20% Range | -5% Bullet Velocity | -0.9% Gun Kick | -14.9% Horiz. Recoil | +9.5% Idle Sway | +9.7% ADS Move.
16" Redwell JX-2O1 Barrel :: +8.3% Range | +8% Bullet Velocity | +4.3% ADS Time
14.2" Winged Barrel :: -8.7% ADS Time | -14% Sprint to Fire
17.1" Abdicator Barrel :: +15% Bullet Velocity | -19.9% Gun Kick | -20.1% Horiz. Recoil | -20% Vert. Recoil | -9.7% ADS Move. | +15.2% ADS Time | +7.9% Sprint to Fire
FIRE MODS: Bolt Carrier Group :: -10.6% Range | -15% Bullet Velocity | +20.4% Gun Kick | +25.1% Horiz. Recoil | +20% Vert. Recoil
Recoil Sync Unit :: -12% Gun Kick | -12% Horiz. Recoil | -12% Vert. Recoil
MAGAZINE: Andean Extended Mag :: -3.2% ADS Move. | +4.3% ADS Time | +18.3% Reload Time
Griffon Reserve Extended :: -6.1% Move. Speed | -4% Crouch Speed | -4.1% Sprint Speed | -6.5% ADS Move. | +8.7% ADS Time | +22% Reload Time | +11.2% Sprint to Fire
DeltaCruise Fast Mag :: -4.3% ADS Time | -19.5% Reload Time | -5.6% Sprint to Fire
MUZZLE: Redwell 5.56 Compensator :: -18.6% Gun Kick | -20% Vert. Recoil
RL-5.56 Brake :: -11.1% Gun Kick | -12% Vert. Recoil
Monolithic Suppressor :: +11.4% Range | +20% Bullet Velocity | +23.9% ADS Time
